item.title: Grinch talks to Dr. Phil
item.description: Watch the Grinch sit down with Dr. Phil for a funny and unexpected therapy session.

media:content.media:title: Grinch talks to Dr. Phil
media:content.media:description: Watch the Grinch sit down with Dr. Phil for a funny and unexpected therapy session.

item.title: The room was NOT letting him slide
item.description: The reactions keep escalating and only get more outrageous as the video goes on.

media:content.media:title: The room was NOT letting him slide
media:content.media:description: The reactions keep escalating and only get more outrageous as the video goes on.

item.title: he really thought that would work
item.description: Sometimes confidence is all it takes to make an already wild moment even funnier.

media:content.media:title: he really thought that would work

item.description: Sometimes the most unexpected moment leads to the best connection.

item.description: Having the right wingman can make every first impression more memorable.

item.title: The room did not know what to do with that.
item.description: One unexpected moment changed the entire atmosphere in seconds.

item.title: The reaction after this one is almost better than the compliment itself.
item.description: The response made the heartfelt compliment even more unforgettable.

media:content.media:title: The reaction after this one is almost better than the compliment itself.

item.title: I wish I could get past his below the belt worm… because we vibedddd
item.description: Sometimes one dealbreaker is all it takes to ruin an otherwise perfect vibe.

media:content.media:title: I wish I could get past his below the belt worm… because we vibedddd
media:content.media:description: Sometimes one dealbreaker is all it takes to ruin an otherwise perfect vibe.

item.title: The second they sat down, it was already over for somebody.

item.title: The reaction says more than the confession ever could.

item.title: You know it got awkward the second that landed.
